gigapan.description:
Here is the Monochrom Taug show, With Johannes, and Kyle Machulis, and Rose White, and Exile Surfer, and Roland

I like Vienna, and I like Monochrom and I like Cocktail Robots and I like Rose, and I like GigaPans.
